critical.mandate: Check for flaky test patterns — they are critical technical debt
Story must be in review status before test review
Output must include machine-readable PASSED or FAILED verdict
When reading or running application source code, use {project-path} as the base directory — NOT {project-root}. {project-path} is resolved by the engine from global.yaml.

step.title: Load Story and Tests
step.action: Resolve story file: search for {story_key}-*.md in {implementation_artifacts}/ using glob pattern to match the full filename ({story_key}-{title_slug}.md)
Read story file, identify files changed
Read test files for the target area

step.title: Status Gate
step.check: HALT: Story must be in review status before test review

step.title: Quality Assessment
step.action: Check: determinism (no timing/order dependencies), isolation (no shared mutable state), naming (descriptive test names reflecting behavior), assertions (meaningful assertions, not just "no error")
Coverage gap analysis: identify untested code paths — error handling branches, boundary conditions, edge cases, null/empty inputs, concurrent access paths, and failure/retry scenarios

Assess critical path coverage: for each high-risk or business-critical function touched by the story, verify that tests exist for the happy path, at least one error path, and boundary values. Flag any critical function with no tests as a blocking gap.

List specific coverage gaps: for each gap, note the function/module, the missing scenario (e.g., "no test for timeout handling in fetchUser"), and rate risk as Critical/High/Medium/Low based on likelihood and impact of the untested path failing in production

step.title: Flakiness Analysis
step.action: Identify potentially flaky tests: timing, state, network dependencies

step.title: Verdict
step.action: If no critical quality issues or flaky tests found: verdict is PASSED
If critical quality issues or flaky tests found: verdict is FAILED — list blocking findings

step.title: Generate Report
step.action: Generate test review report with quality assessment and flakiness findings
step.template-output: Generate test review report with: - Quality assessment (determinism, isolation, naming, assertions) - Coverage Gaps section: table of untested paths (Function/Module | Missing Scenario | Risk Rating). Include untested error handling, boundary conditions, and edge cases. - Critical Path Coverage: list each critical function and whether it has happy-path, error-path, and boundary tests - Flakiness findings - Machine-readable verdict (PASSED/FAILED)

step.title: Update Review Gate and Transition
step.action: Read story file, locate Review Gate table
If PASSED: update Test Review row status to PASSED, link report file
If FAILED: update Test Review row status to FAILED, link report file. Do NOT change story status — the review-gate-check protocol or run-all-reviews orchestrator handles status transitions.
step.template-output: Update story file Review Gate table with test review result and report link.
step.action: Inform user: "Note: sprint-status.yaml may now be out of sync. Run /gaia-sprint-status to reconcile."
